dataList.title: Punishing Bird
successDesc:
The small, tiny bird skips and flits around the containment unit as {0} works on the perch.
Could it be that the entity has taken a liking to {0}?
The small bird picks up the necklace hanging from the perch and slings it around the Sinner's neck.
failureDesc:
The small, tiny bird skips and flits around the containment unit as {0} works on the perch.
Having successfully completed the work, {0} leaves the containment unit, but the small bird's Qliphoth Counter suddenly starts to drop.

"... Is that supposed to happen even when the Work Result is Good?"
"That's not the issue right now! The bird's breached containment!"
"It's really cute, but... Oww! Why's it pecking at me?!"

The escaped small bird starts pecking away at the Sinners without rest.
We quickly fled the hallway, away from it.

dataList.title: 1.76 MHz
successDesc:
{0} exited the containment unit with the "Good" Work Result.
A radio, crackling with static akin to the noise heard from within the containment unit, was affixed on the Sinner's chest.
failureDesc:
1.76 Mhz's Qliphoth Counter suddenly started dropping when {0} left the containment unit, even though the work was concluded successfully.

"W-why is the counter going down?"
"Hold on. I hear something strange from the hallway..."

A mass of distorted static started to fill the hallway, shrouding our vision.
More chaotic zaps and loud explosions followed, and the Sinners began casting nervous glances around in obvious unease.
I took the Sinners and hurried out of the hallway before things could get worse.

dataList.title: Queen Bee Gift Options
successDesc:
{0} came back out of the containment unit after feeding the Queen Bee.
Something sweet-smelling was nestled in {0}'s grasp.
We had no way of telling whether it was a token of favor given in return for the chunk of meat, or a mark left on future prey...
But we decided to keep it in case it proved helpful.
failureDesc:
{0} came back out of the containment unit after feeding the Queen Bee.
The Sinner clutched their head, wincing from a pounding headache.

"Hmm... You did hold your breath properly, didn't you? In any case, we'll have to collect a sample."

The researcher gathered the spores and promptly rushed out of the room.

dataList.title: Singing Machine Gift Options
dataList.behaveDesc: Who will give it a try?
successDesc:
{0} slipped a hand into the suspicious machine.
A flicker of pain crossed the Sinner's face, but after a moment, they gave a small gesture to show that it was bearable.
In response, the machine released a hauntingly beautiful melody.

"I... I need to finish the tuning... before I forget the melody."

The stranger who asked for help started tuning the instrument to match the pitch and tune of the machine.
{0} pulled their hand out and took up the guitar resting nearby.
failureDesc:
{0} slipped a hand into the suspicious machine.
A flicker of pain crossed the Sinner's face, but after a moment, they gave a small gesture to show that it was bearable.
In response, the machine released a hauntingly beautiful melody.

"Ah... Th-that was way too short. More... Let me hear some more!"

The stranger who asked for help pushed the Sinner's arm deeper into the machine.
They handed the guitar to {0}, who was writhing in pain, and started tuning their own instrument.

dataList.title: Singing Machine Gift Options
dataList.behaveDesc: Who will give it a try?
successDesc:

A flicker of pain crossed the Sinner's face, but after a moment, they gave a small gesture to show that it was bearable.
In response, the machine released a hauntingly beautiful melody.

"I... I need to finish the tuning... before I forget."

The stranger who asked for help started tuning the instrument to match the pitch and tune of the machine.
{0} pulled their hand out and took up the bass guitar resting nearby.
failureDesc:
{0} slipped a hand into the suspicious machine.
A flicker of pain crossed the Sinner's face, but after a moment, they gave a small gesture to show that it was bearable.
In response, the machine released a hauntingly beautiful melody.

"Ah... Th-that was way too short. More... Let me hear some more!"

The stranger who asked for help pushed the Sinner's arm deeper into the machine.
They handed the bass guitar to {0}, who was writhing in pain, and started tuning their own instrument.

dataList.title: Singing Machine Gift Option 2 - Harmony Guitar
dataList.behaveDesc: Who will give it a try?
successDesc:
{0} slipped an arm into the machine. In response, the machine let out a beautiful song.

After listening for a long while in thoughtful silence, the stranger gave a satisfied nod and handed the remaining instrument to {0}.
failureDesc:
{0} slipped an arm into the machine. In response, the machine let out a beautiful song.

"... N-no, no. If there's no instrument, then I'll need to hear even a more flawless rhythm."
"Yes... Nothing could make as fascinating music as a human can."

The man tossed us the instrument, and without warning, shoved {0} into the machine.
Before we could even react, the contraption began chewing and devouring {0}...
The wet tear and sickening crunch of {0}'s flesh and bone echoed through the containment unit in grotesque harmony.
Entranced by the rhythm, the stranger set his sights on the other Sinners.
We escaped the containment unit in haste.
